title: Kala Pani
writer: A.J. Cronin, G.R. Kamath, Anand Pal
plot: Based on A.J.Cronin's 'Beyond This Place', this movie narrates the story of an untiring crusade for justice. A young man, learning about his father's wrongful implication in a fifteen-year-old murder, vows to bring the true crimin...
